Localization.Description: A user deleted a predefined data value

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host} deleted predefined data value "{object.name}" in database object "{object.property}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} deleted predefined data value "{object.name}" in database object "{object.property}" on host {event_src.host}
